creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
On Sun, Dec 10, 2000 at 07:38:43PM -0600, Michael C . Wu wrote:
# 
#  | New port of gdrdao, a GTK frontend for cdrdao (the disk-at-once audio CD
#  | recorder).
#  
#  You are lacking this:
#            LIB_DEPENDS=gnome.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnomelibs

Or better yet 'USE_GNOMELIBS=yes'? :)

-steve
